conclusions.conditional_arbitrary_columns: completed signed contiguous layers through order six imply every arbitrary-column signed layer through order six
conclusions.conditional_forward: [Q_(6,n)(-100)>0 for all n] => [Q_(6,n)(lambda)>0 for all n and -100<=lambda<=0]
conclusions.higher_theta: all fixed local differences of log(A_k(-T)/A_k^(1)(-T)) are O_p,m(k^-p) uniformly
conclusions.open_entry_target: Q_(6,n)=-H_(6,n)>0 iff H_(5,n+1)^2>H_(5,n)*H_(5,n+2) at lambda=-100 for every n>=0
conclusions.uniform_eventual_tail: there exists N_6 such that Q_(6,n)(lambda)=-H_(6,n)(lambda)>0 for every n>=N_6 and -100<=lambda<=0
conclusions.uniform_ratio: the complete family has the compact-uniform order-six graded ratio contract with G_2(T,M)->1

countermodel.conclusion: strict signed contiguous layers through order five do not imply order six

determinant_cancellation.independence: G3,...,G16 cancel from the first nonzero coefficient

lambert_extension.difference_bound: Delta_k^m log R_T^(1)(k)=O(log(k)/k^m), m=2,...,16, uniformly for 0<=T<=100

newton_transfer.triangular_support: the coefficient of j^r uses only D_m with m>=r and diagonal D_r/r!

proof_boundary: This artifact proves the signed order-six uniform eventual tail, the general condensation/cooperative recursion, and a conditional forward theorem. It does not prove all-shift order-six entry, full order-six invariance, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: The complete signed layer through fixed order five supplies the positive lower cone for order six.
rows.proof_boundary: Completed fixed-order input only; no order-six sign is imported.

rows.claim: The all-order suitable-multiplier theorem extends the compact heat-tilt audit through order sixteen.

lambert.difference_bound: Delta_k^m log R_T^(1)(k)=O(log(k)/k^m), m=2,...,16, uniformly for 0<=T<=100

rows.proof_boundary: First theta summand only; compact heat interval.

rows.claim: Uniform superpolynomial first-summand dominance removes every higher-theta correction needed by the order-six stencil.
rows.formula: all fixed local differences of log(A_k(-T)/A_k^(1)(-T)) are O_p,m(k^-p) uniformly

rows.claim: Eleven-node Newton interpolation transfers local heat differences to the graded order-six ratio coefficients.

diagnostics.triangular_support: the coefficient of j^r uses only D_m with m>=r and diagonal D_r/r!

rows.proof_boundary: Exact on backward shifts zero through ten.

rows.claim: The normalized six-by-six determinant vanishes through h^14 and has the universal signed first coefficient.

diagnostics.independence: G3,...,G16 cancel from the first nonzero coefficient

rows.claim: The heat-deformed Xi family has one eventual positive signed order-six tail uniformly through lambda zero.
rows.formula: there exists N_6 such that Q_(6,n)(lambda)=-H_(6,n)(lambda)>0 for every n>=N_6 and -100<=lambda<=0

rows.claim: Every new signed contiguous layer is strict log-concavity of the preceding signed layer.
rows.proof_boundary: General Desnanot-Jacobi identity with exact orientation parity.

rows.claim: Signed order-six entry is exactly strict log-concavity of the completed positive H_5 sequence.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact endpoint coordinate; no positivity asserted here.

rows.claim: At every fixed order, the heat flow is cooperative over the completed preceding signed layer and needs no next-order sign.
rows.proof_boundary: General affine-Hankel and adjacent Plucker algebra.

rows.claim: The signed order-six heat flow has a strictly positive nearest-neighbor coefficient throughout the completed order-five cone.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact order-six specialization with three zero symbolic residuals.

rows.claim: All-shift lambda=-100 entry would complete signed contiguous and arbitrary-column order six through lambda zero.
rows.formula: [Q_(6,n)(-100)>0 for all n] => [Q_(6,n)(lambda)>0 for all n and -100<=lambda<=0]; completed signed contiguous layers through order six imply every arbitrary-column signed layer through order six
rows.proof_boundary: Conditional on the explicit endpoint theorem only.

rows.claim: The completed lower signed layers do not imply order six abstractly.

diagnostics.conclusion: strict signed contiguous layers through order five do not imply order six

rows.proof_boundary: Exact rational finite sequence; blocks lower-layer promotion.

rows.claim: Prove strict all-shift signed order-six entry at lambda=-100.
rows.proof_boundary: Sole open input in this fixed-order-six propagation route.

source_contract.heat_tilt_status: uniform compact-heat first-summand heat-tilt asymptotic theorem
source_contract.higher_theta_status: uniform compact-heat superpolynomial first-summand dominance theorem
source_contract.order5_status: contiguous and arbitrary-column order-five theorem on -100<=lambda<=0
source_contract.xi_ratio_source: Griffin-Ono-Rolen-Thorner-Tripp-Wagner, Jensen Polynomials for the Riemann Xi Function

status: exact uniform eventual signed order-six tail and conditional forward reduction with one open lambda=-100 entry
